value.found_quote: Tracing is built into the Agents SDK and is enabled by default in the normal server-side SDK path. Every run can emit a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans, which you can inspect in the Traces dashboard.
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that tracing is built into the Agents SDK and enabled by default, emitting a structured record of model calls, tool calls, and handoffs. The table also lists "Built-in tracing" as the recommended approach for debugging, and the page covers MCP integration options alongside tracing. All core elements of the claim are directly substantiated by the page content.
